description: A horizontal memorial graphic. Large white serif text on the left reads Wall of Honor beside a small blue ribbon with an ICE badge logo. Below it, smaller text reads Special Agent Renault R. Bayhi, End of Watch, Tuesday, April 29, 1975. The center shows a close-up of a gold law-enforcement badge inscribed U.S. Customs, The Department of the Treasury, and Special Agent. The right side shows red roses in front of a U.S. flag.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Special Agent Renault R. Bayhi; End of Watch; Tuesday, April 29, 1975; U.S. CUSTOMS; THE DEPARTMENT OF THE TREASURY; SPECIAL AGENT
